caption:
I bow to Lord Ishana, the very form of liberation — all-pervading, the essence of Veda and Brahman; the inherent, attributeless, undivided, motionless one — the sky of consciousness who dwells in space — him I worship.

— Rudrashtakam 1 (Shaiva tradition)
